headlines.title: Nvidia stock clinches record close, pushing market cap over $5 trillion once again
Stock Market Week Ahead: Hyperscaler Blitz, Federal Reserve Transition
Alphabet's Google Could Supercharge This Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stock That Has Soared 78% in 2026. Here's Why You Should Buy It Hand Over Fist Before It Is Too Late.

Earnings Preview: What to Expect From Analog Devices’ Report

Consumer prices rose 3.3% in March, as energy prices spiked due to Iran conflict
headlines.desc: The consumer price index was expected to show a 3.3% year-over-year gain in March, according to the Dow Jones consensus.

headlines.title: Fed Governor Waller says Iran war and labor market risks are keeping central bank on hold
headlines.desc: Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller on Friday said current economic conditions are complicating the approach to interest rates.

headlines.title: Buying chip stocks is getting pricey. Traders don't care
headlines.desc: The VanEck Semiconductor ETF (SMH) tracking the sector is up more than 30% this month.

headlines.title: Offbeat Wall Street research firm says it sent an analyst to Strait of Hormuz. Here's what they learned
headlines.desc: Before the U.S and Israel began their war against Iran, about 20% of the world's oil was shipped through the narrow Strait of Hormuz.

headlines.title: Hormuz blockade could deepen world’s worst energy crisis — and risk a dangerous misstep
headlines.desc: The U.S. naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz threatens to halt more tanker traffic, sending oil surging and risks drawing China into a widening confrontation with Washington.

headlines.title: What Apple investors need to know about the next steps for the company and its new CEO
headlines.desc: Tim Cook built a $4 trillion powerhouse. Now John Ternus must fix Apple’s glaring AI gap.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts see strong growth potential in these 3 stocks
headlines.desc: Investors should look beyond short-term volatility and consider these growth stocks that analysts see upside for, according to TipRanks.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts prefer these dividend stocks for steady income
headlines.desc: Given ongoing uncertainty, investors may seek to add some stability to their portfolios by buying dividend stocks for steady income.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts are bullish on these 3 stocks for the long haul
headlines.desc: Picking stocks can be challenging due to the vast universe of equities. Investors can follow the ratings of top Street analysts and make informed decisions.

headlines.title: Big Tech is the bull market’s win-win trade right now — making this week crucial
headlines.desc: Big Tech has roared back in April. Why it could be your win-win trade during the U.S.-Iran standoff.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts pick these 3 dividend stocks for reliable income
headlines.desc: Those looking for a stable stream of passive income amid uncertainty can add stocks of some well-established dividend-paying companies to their portfolios.

headlines.title: Iran oil shock stirs memories of 1997 Asian Financial Crisis — but here’s why history may not repeat itself
headlines.desc: The Hormuz disruption is hammering Asian economies with surging energy costs and weakening currencies, but a repeat of the crisis three decades ago is unlikely.

headlines.title: Inflation held sticky at 3% as U.S. headed into war with Iran, key Fed gauge shows
headlines.desc: The gauge released Thursday offers the Federal Reserve a snapshot of conditions leading into the Iran war.

headlines.title: 'CAR' crash: Avis Budget stock plunge reminding some on Wall Street of GameStop
headlines.desc: Shares of Avis Budget Group, ticker 'CAR,' soared from under $100 last month to a record high near $850 in early trading Wednesday before a sharp U-turn lower intraday.

headlines.title: Wholesale prices rose 0.5% in March, much less than expected despite war impact
headlines.desc: The producer price index was expected to increase 1.1% in March, according to the Dow Jones consensus estimate.

headlines.title: Berkshire shares left behind as S&P 500 rallies to record high
headlines.desc: While the overall market was soaring over the past two weeks, Berkshire wasn't doing much of anything, as its shares slipped to MTD drops of just under 1%.

headlines.title: Why $4 a gallon gas prices won’t trigger Fed interest rate hikes — and could lead to cuts
headlines.desc: While there's still plenty of uncertainty about where rates are headed, Wall Street commentary shifted back to expectations for cuts.

headlines.title: A fragile U.S.-Iran ceasefire sparks market relief — but no clear path to lasting peace
headlines.desc: The fragile ceasefire agreement is likely to face significant challenges, analysts told CNBC, citing a significant trust deficit on both sides.

headlines.title: Power Insider: The markets are obsessed with the Strait of Hormuz. Why it matters less than you think
headlines.desc: Retail and pro traders are obsessed with gauging the traffic in the Strait of Hormuz, thinking they can gain an edge on where oil prices are going. They can’t.

headlines.title: U.S. says Hormuz blockade 'fully implemented,' while signaling diplomatic off-ramp for Iran
headlines.desc: The White House has been signaling a diplomatic solution to the conflict in the Middle East, as discussions around continuing negotiations with Tehran are underway.

headlines.title: Chubb's earnings blew past the Street. Here's why the stock is falling
headlines.desc: Instead of focusing on those numbers, investors are spooked by signs of a softening property insurance market, with competition increasing and rates declining.
